benchmarks.note: Harder version of GLUE with more complex tasks

benchmarks.note: Extractive reading comprehension with unanswerable questions

benchmarks.name: BoolQ
benchmarks.note: Boolean yes/no questions with reading passage

benchmarks.name: HumanEval

benchmarks.name: AlpacaEval
benchmarks.note: Instruction-following win rate vs GPT-4-Turbo reference

note: Scores are representative published values. BERT scores of 0 indicate the task requires generation capability BERT doesn't have. Claude scores reflect Claude 3 Opus/Sonnet range. LLaMA scores reflect LLaMA 3 70B.
